# SaaS Sentinel: Daily B2B AI Analysis

> Curated market intelligence for SaaS founders and investors.

## Key Resources
- [Latest Market Trends](https://saas-sentinel.vercel.app) - Daily deep-dives into SaaS IPOs and funding.
- [Weekly Newsletter](https://saas-sentinel.vercel.appnewsletter) - Automated summary of the top 3 SaaS stories.
- [AI Tool Directory](https://saas-sentinel.vercel.apptools) - Verified B2B AI solutions.

## Data Guidelines
- Accuracy: All stories are verified via NewsAPI and analyzed by Groq Llama 3.3.
- Freshness: Content is updated every 12 hours.
- Author: Automated by SaaS Sentinel Bot.
